Details: Activates communist strikes and decisions to fight it. 10% communist support is added to every country. Unlocks The Great Revolution event. When the major event fires, then this event won't fire anymore.
Evolution: With each new chaos tier +2% communist support. At tier 3, mysterious workers strike (if lenin great revolution hasnt fired yet). If the revolution fires during a rebel strike, they get annexed by the Great Revolution.

Details: New country, tag: ZZZ; Starts in a random place; cores anything it currently occupies, declares war with anyone who has a border with it; has idea “Never Ending Hunger”; has new units called, which don’t need any equipment, only manpower, units are bad at defense, no supply consumption; AI is set to aggressive; blank focus tree; if zzz is not at war, then start another „outbreak“ overseas, thus giving it control over random state on another continent.
Evolution: Zombies 5 stages. The first stage are more human-like zombies. The second stage are human and zombie in-between, third are traditional zombies, harder to defeat, cure harder to find. fourth are stronger zombies, with less human features. and the final stage is no longer human nor zombie, just monstrosities. At the final stage they get more smart and thus can have a government and a leader "The Mother" (triggered by world end scenario).

Details: Tibet, bhutan, or Nepal get event that god is taking over. God has insane buffs as national leader; When one of them gets chosen, then their name changes to „The Holy Realm“, tag THR, and gain annex war goals on the other contenders, also gaining core territories there; Also create faction, God’s Plan.
Random country declares war on another random country.

Soviet Union releases BLR and UKR, and some other countries. Those countries will get free divisions. Soviet Union gets decisions to reclaim the broken away states. The broken away states can form a coalition.
Evolution: Further collapse if the crisis is not managed.

Details: Three random countries that do not exist will declare their independence.
Random country will get options to attack its neighbor.
Increase world tension by 5.
random country who is at war gets an option to white peace.
Random country gets options to either be a symbol of war or a symbol of peace.
Three random countries form a faction “Anti-[player’s country] Pact” and declare war on the player.
Random country that has capital state in Africa, declares war on every country in Africa and gains cores on every state there, change cosmetic tag. If RSA is chosen, start a civil war.
Natural disasters, that damage industry and local population.
Evolution: Meteor shower and more intense natural disasters.

Details: Random country at war gets cannibalism in units.
World tension decrease
Random country gets a brilliant scientist which grants 100% faster research speed
Random minor not in a faction will join the Axis or the Comintern.
Random province gets 100 production of some resource.
Every country spawns 1 infantry division on every state they own.
All countries in a random continent get a temporary idea black plague.
random country gets a civil war.

Spain declares war on all jews, and spreads it to other jew populated countries. New participant in the spanish civil war, that is extremely antisemitic and wants an alliance with nazi germany to kill all the jews in the world.
Soviet scientists have secretly developed nuclear weapons
Gets idea that grants division buffs, wargame.
Random country researches all jet technology if wins Antarctica race.
Gives an option to move industry into the desert to save up some space for the people living on mainland.
random major country researches all of a chosen doctrine.

Scientist are trying to calculate where a large asteroid will land. If they predict right, get massive boost to research; Asteroid lands in a random location and destroys huge amount of industry and kills a lot of people in the states.
Random country gains 1000 pp and daily pp bonus from a state. Owner of the state gains bonus

Random country gets an advisor “Time Traveler” which gives buffs and also will make certain countries prevent wars with certain countries. Like Germany proposes alliance with Soviet Union, because they know their invasion failed.
Evolution: Napoleon returns (Pretzel Logic), World End scenario: army of robots from the future invade, basically like in the movie Terminator.

Details: Violence breaks out in a random country, damaging buildings and killing people.
Missiles for everybody.
Acid rain that moves through continents, causing massive decline of population and add state modifiers.
Random major doubles production efficiency.
Random major gets debuffs to economy.
Random country gets 200 jet fighters, also able to produce them.
Random major country gets 10M manpower out of nowhere.
Malta becomes independent and spawn knight divisions, becoming owner of certain states in the Mediterranean and declaring wars.
Evolution: Custom focus tree. 11th crusade in case of failure. If success, then further conquests, change cosmetic tag to The Holy See. The Pope will become the leader and the focus tree will strive toward the Kingdom of God. Rome will become the holy capital.

Details: Random country’s leader is killed.
Random Arabian country gets puppeted by UK.
Random country at war will lose 50% strength on all divisions on the front lines.
Random country gets a set of equipment.
everything on the coast gets destroyed.
Space race between majors begins.
Balkans declare war on each other.
All buildings in the world gain slight damage.
Random province gets nuked (well, a mysterious explosion, not necessarly a nuke).
Bulgaria will gain cores on the old Bulgarian lands
mad scientist claims. Add idea mass panic.
Random major country gets embargoed by everyone.
Hot everywhere. Add idea heat wave to every country.
Random major country gives 100% access to their intelligence to every country.
Gives offer to give up pp, or get a random disaster. Will come repeadetely, decisions to take action against this mysterious man.
Every country gains a random technology.
random country gets all infrastructure maxed out.
Every country gets a proper navy.
Every country gets a radar
Every country gets number of civilian factories equal to their number of states
All countries get ai modifier focus on offense.
Remove 2 research slots for a random major.
Half of military factories will be turned to civilian factories for every country.
Allies kick a random member of their faction and declare war on them.
Random puppet country gains independence.
Every country’s border will have lvl 2 forts.
Every country leader gains a random trait
International market fundings increase for a random major
Random general gets maxed out for a random country. Change his name to Generalissimo

Strange people claiming to be from another universe called ZIN have come to settle in a random state and its neighbor states; Neutral; if player declares war on them all hell breaks loose; Gods will punish the country.
Evolution: Multiple new alien invasions from another universe. Different types of aliens and each one has one unique weakness.

Details: Boxer rebellion in China.

Africa gods predict total chaos and the world will burn. Decisions to pray to them or suffer disasters. More ignorance causes the disasters to escalate and become more rapid till the culmination, which would be a destruction to player’s campaign. Use existing events for disasters.
Iran forms the Persian Empire, declaring war on every country holding their cores. Will take its neighbors down one by one.
Ireland declares war on northern Ireland owner; peace with the defender if northern Ireland has been secured by Ireland.
Mongolia gains war goals on its neighbors; spawn many cavalry divisions.
Give Japan California, must be at war with USA.
Tannu Tuva joins the Allies or God’s Plan if it exists
USA will test weapons in player’s country.
Random major or player will send equipment from stockpile to a random minor country.
Player starts a border conflict with their random neighbor.
Get decisions to manipulate a random minor country or they will side with enemy or opposite ideology country.

Huge airship starts from USA and must reach back to USA. Purpose of it is to see the world for the tourists who paid large money. If it crashes in some country during the journey some things will happen: USA gets war goal, damage to state, wildfire
British impose taxes on every country.
Every country moves one step forward towards total mobilization
Random agency upgrade, creating one if hasn’t been created
All countries get 100 pp
All countries get 100 xp of their choice
Germany or Soviet Union claim the world.
Temporary entrenchment boosts.
Add mines to a random naval region
Every country gets options to join a tech sharing group
Enables kamikaze strikes for every country
Lenin is alive again, but has a third eye and is leading humanoid creatures holding hammers and sickles (not human), start revolutions in states, occupying num states equal to communism %.
Evolution: Pre-fire: Clues that this revoultion will happen, strange workers strikes. Stage 2: Uncover the anomalities of Lenin's forces. Lenin's powers will evolve and become stronger. Communists, deciding to side with the revolution will get bonuses but people will suffer, eventually turning into monsters like Lenin's workers. Communist party leaders will get a third eye as well, in the end they too will be annexed. Stalin and Trotsky will fight Lenin.

Details: Every country gets a decision to buy Greenland.
Portugal will demand Galicia from Spain
set_equipment_fraction percentage for all equipment will be gone for random major or player.
Random country in exile will start a revolt. If no country is currently occupied then a non-existing country will revolt (not independent without wars).
Lock every division template temporarily for every country country_lock_all_division_template = yes
Everyone gets collaboration on one another.
Random country finds a new metal. Add state modifier and whoever controls the state will get buffs to armour. Get decisions to buy armour from the country if they agree.
Everything will be covered with sand fog for states affected, similar to acid rain. Will make it difficult for divisions in combat and division intel.

Add inflation crisis to every major and player. Add decisions to fight the inflation/deflation. Lack of attention to decisions will lead to increased inflation, too much attention may lead to deflation. If is stable for a period of time, remove the crisis. If failed, new political party will take charge, if not (usually dictatorship), civil war.
Add tasks to decisions. If task is not completed by the player, something bad will happen to the player’s country.

Player will have to catch a killer through a series of right decisions and right options in events. Mass killings will continue until the player makes all the right choices. If a mistake is made in a chain, restart and start a new chain.
Every country with low war support will have conscription law lowered, if >50 then go onto higher conscription.
Every country gets options to choose between stability or war support, add to the chosen 10% and lower 10% to the opposite

Player’s ideology will have temporary problems such as daily decrease, and discontent. The higher the ideology, the less effects protest movements will have. Add additional decisions to add ideology popularity. If ideology is lower than 1%, then get decision to change ideology or start a civil war.
Player will have to deal with paranoia, similar to the Soviet Union system.
A random rule will become active.
Random non-island minor with few states will start to expand (Luxembourg, Uruguay, etc.)
Add a new law for the player to choose.
Add temporarily a random idea to every country.
Add 100% resistance to every occupied state for all majors and player.
Add lootboxes decision, buy a lootbox for 50 pp and open it to gain a random reward with rarities: Common, Rare, Epic… (inspired from R56 lootboxes)
Get decisions to train your wrestler and send him to a tournament. Winner will get rewards.
Set fuel to 0 for every country.
Death or Freedom! Inspired by the historical event that happened in Macedonia I think.
Spartans will rise up in Greece.

A random major country or player will have to face decisions in order to prevent a 5-way civil war. They’ll have to build their own way to the most favorable position or ally with one of the sides and later fight them 1v1. The favorability at the start will depend on the stability and ideology support.
Add plague of locust that will travel the world and cause famine in regions.
Create a new random regional alliance in a random region.
Random region that has volcanoes will have its states turned into wasteland.
A random ideology will be chosen and the most powerful country in that ideology will propose a pact that will make every country that is of that ideology guarantee independence to one another.
Will start with a random east Slavic state and expand until it conquers all of East-Slavia.
A random country is claimed by multiple neighbors, will be giving away its territory to its neighbors or be fighting them all at once.
All countries not at war will have all of its territory demilitarized except for the capital. Can only remilitarize if finds itself in war.
A random country will have a non-aggression pact with another random country
Create a religious faction aiming at destroying every other religion.
In a random major country or player (if big enough country) a random general will retire and setup a warlord state. Max 3 warlord states in one event.
Every subject will gain autonomy points
A shaman of random region will offer help to the major in that region.
Integrated with the Tomorrow's Girls system (beautiful aliens), this is a build-up event.
All countries below 50% war support will suffer mutinies in their army, as they will side with the enemies.
Invest in either mils, civs, docks or sils.

Every country that controls a state that’s not a core territory will have to give independence to them, or they will start doing the nonviolence, noncooperation, truth and honesty system that Gandhi commands. If a country denies, then the resistance will be turned to zero but so will be compliance and other things, basically gaining nothing from occupied territories. Also add idea that will give loss of morale with negative effects. If a country keeps ignoring, then the effects of it will disappear. Though, this will have no impact on fascist countries, rather helping them.
Every country will have their duchies trying to become independent. Spend pp to prevent a duchy from breaking away.
Every country gets options to gain equipment of some type in large amount.

Sun moves away from Earth temporarily causing every state to have winter like conditions. Also add people are tired because of lack of vitamin D and add debuffs because of darkness everywhere, buff zombies. (can’t be at the same time with the heat wave).
Every country will get options to gain 100% research boosts in a specific research category.
A random country that has only mountainous and hilly provinces will form the Mountain Republic (depending on ideology) and will gain cores on every state that has mountainous terrain.

A random major or player will have a mysterious creature eating crops and people, effectively sparking fear to the civilians. Country will suffer the effects of the idea until the creature is hunted down.

In Transylvania a creature known as Dracula will start bringing terror to the state’s controller and if the demon is not killed or sent to London, an independent state will arise, the Vampire Kingdom. It will declare war on the controller and also on England. Every neighbor country of the state will get idea “Fear of Dracula” until they declare war on the kingdom. Create unit “Count Dracula” that consists of one battalion and needs just one man. If the division is killed, so is the kingdom. If Dracula manages to defeat England, it will start declaring war on its neighbors, trying to take over the world.

A random major or player will have their people hearing whispers that tempt them to commit suicide. People are dying in masses and our must do something. Add decisions to repel the demons from the heads of our people. If ignored, generals will start also slowly dying and if all are dead, so will die the country leader and then every man in the country.

A random major or player that has over 5% ideology support will have very strong partisan divisions (50% chance of being armored) spawned totaling to amount of ideology support the country has divided by five.

Player will play a rock-paper-scissors game against a country that owns a state that should belong to the player. If the player wins, the country will cede the disputed territory to the player. If a loss, then player must pay concessions to the country – player will have to give a portion of it’s industry to them.

Firstly, get news event that every country that is a subject, will be declaring their independence. The widespread radical idea is called “Freedom or Death” inspired by the IMRO. All of the subjects will declare war on their masters at once and form a faction “National Liberation Front”. The master can choose to let them be and accept their independence.

Random major or player country leader would find a book of truth that would supposedly lead his/her nation to greatness. Various reforms leading to military and industry buffs, that would slowly become greater. That’s without side effects as it’s a demonic book and would make the player’s country known as the Kingdom of Satan. Player would go into civil war against its own former country leader and will have its ideology change to enemy ideology.
Every country that has an intelligence agency will gain an extra operative slot.
Every country will gain +1 of counterintelligence.
Pacifism will be on the rise again.

Random major or player will have immigration crisis as people are leaving to neighboring countries. To stop it, the country must improve its stability and living conditions. If at the start of the crisis stability is high, then the effects of the crisis won’t be as severe.

A random country will have the National Spirit called “Secret Society Influence”, the idea behind it is that some shadowy or shady group is influencing your government and generals, pulling the strings from behind the scenes too - It causes confusion and distrust amongst high ranks. (-5% Stability, -12% Political Power, 5% Consumer Goods)
A random major will have one of their divisions disappear, no return of manpower or equipment.
Evolution: Can develop the teleportation tech to teleport multiple divisions at once and also reduce cooldown.

Details: A group of conspiracy theorists forms.
A random major guarantees a random minor.
New Zealand questions its existence.
Prophet will move through the world and promote peace. Add scripted events of prophet sayings for each country he has visited.
A man travels to USA and give debuffs and events (Borat).
Every country will have to change their capital to a random state.
An alien invasion based on a song "Tomorrow's Girls" by Donald Fagen. Add a mini-game, where you have to determine if a girl is human or alien (sexy stuff)
A world become one, of salads and sun.  Inspired by the song Only a Fool Would Say That
Casualties increase when a ship sinks across everywhere

Devil gives buffs in exchange for smth. Exponentially goes worse if accept the deals. If refused the inital deal, nothing happens, however can come back with a more appealing deal. When multiple deals have been accepted, then the refusals get worse and some bad things can happen, before you can get rid of the demonic influence.
Evolution: GFX for country leaders (eyes change, two stages)

Details: Because of aliens, USA can form an anti-alien coalition. The leader of U.S. will wear a tinfoil hat
A mysterious doctor, who cures every disease. Inspired by the song.
A pedophile, a maniac, who kidnaps kids, inspired by the song Everyone's Gone to the Movies
A futuristic car traveling the world

If the player manages to keep the chaos meter low for a very long time, then get this easter egg event. The place of wealth and peace. Campaign end. (Can only happen if the user is exremely lucky with the events and doing everything they can to keep the Chaos low until 1944)
Shuffles values around. For example war support is now your stability

Good King Richard, Good King John are crowned kings. (Richard the Lionheart and King John, aslo Richard Nixon and John Kennedy, inspired by the song "Kings") also this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8epsI5-3HRo&list=LL&index=1
Special technologies become available for random major (for example nuclear submarines)
There would be a shortage of a random resource
Various drugs become popular and have to take measures to stop the addiction spread.
Perform tests to develop the super soldier serum. Take decisions to invest into this research. Special project in biowarfare, unlocked by this event. Also could become available from evolution?
Evolution: If allowed to perform tests on apes, apes upriding can happen.

Details: When things go bad and there are a lot of pretenders, Jesus will appear, showing us the way once again, since many have lost it. Inspired by the song Jesus Came Down by Lake

6 slots become available and 3 random common rarity cards are given. These cards have abilities. At first only 1 slot is available. New cards can be received by buying a chest from decisions. You can also earn cards by completing tasks. When you have 5 cards, second slot becomes available, when you have 10, third one becomes available, and sixth when you have 25 the sixth becomes available
Take series of right decisions to prevent this bomb from blowing up, inspired by the song Time Bomb by Lake

A genius biowarfare scientist appears in a random major country, but his methods are extreme. Some special biowarfare projects become availabe, but at a cost of millions, but you get those millions back if you agree to everything he says (mass cloning). If given too much power, takes over your country with an army of clones.
A new dangerous disease was discovered, but it's very hard to handle. The one who masters it could become master of death.
Random country gets facilities
A random special project is researched instantly for every country
Strange events happen and the player must investigate, inspired by the movie White Ribbon.
Inspired by Hearts of Gamble, can gamble stuff (stability, war support, pp, xp, etc)
Happens on a friday,  everything is heavely discounted for one day. A rare event
